_source: Photos sourced from img1.wsimg.com (The Civil's GoDaddy CDN) and tripadvisor.ca's photo library. See ASSETS.md for the per-image inventory and original filename mapping.

items.alt: The Civil's dining room with damask wallpaper, leather banquette, brass lamps, and a chalkboard reading 'On Tap — Bellwoods Civil Lager'.
A pizza in the foreground and a four-glass cocktail flight behind it, set against The Civil's signature damask wallpaper.
Black-and-white photo of an illuminated marquee BAR sign mounted to a heritage-tannery beam.
A whiskey sour in the foreground with a margarita flight on a wooden flight board behind it.
Gin cocktail with a dried pineapple wheel and rosemary sprig, lit by a vintage cut-glass lamp.
A negroni with a large ice block, blood orange peel rose, and segment, on a dark surface.
A red cocktail with a basil leaf garnish on a dark table beside a white wall.
Gin & tonic flight in pastel-coloured mason jars on a wooden flight board.
Cocktail flight with strawberry, pineapple, and citrus garnishes against the damask wallpaper.
Bright cocktail flight with dragon fruit and lime garnishes, white-brick background.
Bourbon hot chocolate flight — four mugs topped with whipped cream against a tufted booth.
Bourbon hot chocolate trio in clear glass mugs on a paddle.
Pepperoni pizza close-up drizzled with hot honey.
Dill Communication pizza top-down — dill pickles, sesame, and sauce drizzle on a wire rack.
You Seem Like A Fungi pizza, mushroom-forward, in a takeout box.
